author: IGN YouTube
text:
Forza Horizon 6 Pirate Gets Banned Until the Year 10,000 - IGN Daily Fix
In today's Daily Fix:
The upcoming launch of Forza Horizon 6 suffered a setback last weekend when the game was leaked onto piracy websites. Now developer Playground Games is going after anyone caught streaming it, and they're making good on their threats. An unidentified YouTuber streamed the game, with their gamertag visible, and was hit with a hardware ban until December 31, 9999, a ban of nearly 8,000 years. That same pirate then used a different account to stream the game ahead, and said they weren't worried about any sort of ban. In other news, eBay has rejected GameStop's offer to buy the company for $56 billion. GameStop's CEO Ryan Cohen apparently isn't helping his company's case by going to CNBC and refusing to give a straight answer about where GameStop will even get fifty-six billion dollars. And finally, Dead Space's producer doesn't think a new game in the franchise will happen.

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Call of the Elder Gods Review
Call of the Elder Gods reviewed by Alessandro Fillari on PC, also available on PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and Nintendo Switch 2.

Call of the Elder Gods wonderfully captures the otherworldly tone and sense of mystery of its predecessor, which remains a hidden gem of this decade. While its ambitions chip away at feeling as captivating, it's an especially touching sequel to further explore the events of Call of the Sea while still having some rewarding Myst-style puzzle solving to complement a new story that's about finding a sense of closure. Developer Out of the Blue Games' follow-up nails the emotional core of its first-person adventure effort, all while giving its characters and puzzle design time to shine.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Deadzone Rogue 2 - Official Announcement Trailer
Don't miss the Announcement Trailer for Deadzone Rogue 2, a first-person action roguelite developed by Prophecy Games. Players will fight alone or in three-player co-op across an all-new campaign set on a version of Earth that's worn down to disarray. Use new weapons and augments to take on the Monarch's forces from run to run to survive the narrative of Talon 13-10. Deadzone Rogue 2 is coming soon to PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

#DeadzoneRogue2 #Gaming #IGN

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Sinking City 2 Preview: A Promising but Inconsistent Eldritch Horror Adventure
The Sinking City 2 has made big changes in the hopes of capitalizing on the untapped potential left to float in the void in the first game. A better, more interesting protagonist; a revamped and easier to parse investigation system; and better-paced missions might help this eldritch sequel rise above clever curiosity for fans of tentacle-tinged horror and into must-play territory for everyone this time around, so long as it’s not held back by the underwhelming combat and puzzles that nagged the previous game and don’t seem to be fully solved here just yet. Previewed by Jarrett Green

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Marvel Rivals - Official Devil Dinosaur Character Reveal Trailer
Don't miss the Devil Dinosaur Character Reveal Trailer for Marvel Rivals, the hit third-person action hero shooter developed by NetEase Games. Players will get a new look at the upcoming hero, Devil Dinosaur. Chomp and smash through the opposing team as a bloodthirsty dinosaur mixed with Moon Girl's brains to make good use of the razor-sharp fangs and a force-field shield for protection. Fight as Devil Dinosaur on May 15 with Season 8 of Marvel Rivals on PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store).

#MarvelRivals #Gaming #DevilDinosaur

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Marvel Rivals - Official Season 8 Dev Vision Vol. 17
Take a look at the Season 8 Dev Vision Vol. 17 for Marvel Rivals, the hit team-based hero shooter developed by NetEase Games. Get the rundown on the updates and additions coming with Season 8, as Cyclops and Devil Dinosaur join the fight. New College Student Perks and major PC storage optimizations are coming with the launch of Season 8 of Marvel Rivals on May 15 for PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Battlefield 6 - Official Season 3 Cinematic Trailer
Check out the Season 3 Cinematic Trailer for Battlefield 6, the latest addition to the hit first-person shooter franchise developed by DICE, Battlefield Studios, and EA. Players will fight across three chapters within Season 3, Warlords: Supremacy, Blastpoint, and High-Value Target. Take on the opposition with new weapons, maps, and more as the PAX Warlords declare war on NATO. Season 3 is available now for Battlefield 6 on PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Marvel Rivals - Official 'Sins of Alchemax' Season 8 Trailer
Don't miss the 'Sins of Alchemax' Season 8 Trailer for Marvel Rivals, the hit third-person action hero shooter developed by NetEase Games. Players can prepare for a new fight against the Alchemax conspiracy that goes deeper than what remains at the Alchemax Headquarters in Lower Manhattan. Season 8 is packed with new heroes, such as the leader of the X-Men, Cyclops, alongside a tease at Devil Dinosaur. Season 8 kicks off on May 15 for PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight - Official Deluxe Edition Trailer
Check out the Deluxe Edition Trailer for LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight, the upcoming action-adventure game developed by TT Games. Players can get a look at what's in store with the Deluxe Edition of the game, including the Arkham Trilogy Pack, Party Music Pack, and the Batman Beyond Pack with Batmobile skins and Batman Suits. The Deluxe Edition also includes the upcoming Mayhem Collection launching in September 2026. LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight will be available on PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam & Epic Games Store) on May 22, 2026. Deluxe Edition pre-orders will receive 72-hour early access beginning on May 19, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Wizard of the Kremlin - Exclusive Clip (2026) Jude Law, Paul Dano
In the chaos of post-Soviet Russia, rising KGB officer Vladimir Putin (Jude Law) joins forces with master manipulator Vadim Baranov (Paul Dano) to reshape life behind the Iron Curtain, using violence and deception to change the world forever. Putin and Baranov’s reign of chaos begins with lies and corruption, and quickly escalates to assassinations, tyranny, and eventually all-out war.

Directed and co-written by Olivier Assayas, based on the fictionalized novel Le Mage du Kremlin by Giuliano da Empoli. The cast also includes Alicia Vikander, Tom Sturridge, Will Keen, and Jeffrey Wright.

Vertical will release The Wizard of the Kremlin exclusively in North American theaters on May 15
